title: jacobinia pohliana
intro: Jacobinia pohliana, also known as Jacobinia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are used to treat various health conditions. Jacobinia pohliana has been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy for its potential health benefits, including immune system support and wound healing.
